name: get_username
description: Intelligently determines the appropriate username or alias for Salesforce operations.

defaultTargetOrg.description: Resolve the default target org username

defaultDevHub.description: Resolve the default target devhub org username

directory.description: The directory to run this tool from (absolute path)

name: list_all_orgs
description: Lists all configured Salesforce orgs. Only use if the user explicitly asks for a list of orgs.

directory.description: The directory to run this tool from (absolute path)

name: run_soql_query
description: Run a SOQL query against a Salesforce org.

usernameOrAlias.description: The username or alias for the Salesforce org

directory.description: The directory to run this tool from (absolute path)

useToolingApi.description: Use Tooling API for the operation

name: deploy_metadata
description: Deploy metadata to an org from your local project.

ignoreConflicts.description: Ignore conflicts and deploy local files, even if they overwrite changes in the org.

sourceDir.description: Path to the local source files to deploy.

manifest.description: Full file path for manifest (XML file) of components to deploy.

apexTestLevel.description: Apex test level to use during deployment.

apexTests.description: Apex test classes to run during deployment.

usernameOrAlias.description: The username or alias for the Salesforce org

directory.description: The directory to run this tool from (absolute path)

name: retrieve_metadata
description: Retrieve metadata from an org to your local project.

ignoreConflicts.description: Ignore conflicts and save files to local filesystem.

sourceDir.description: Path to the local source files to retrieve.

manifest.description: Full file path for manifest (XML file) of components to retrieve.

usernameOrAlias.description: The username or alias for the Salesforce org

directory.description: The directory to run this tool from (absolute path)

name: run_apex_test
description: Run Apex tests in an org.

async.description: Whether to wait for tests to finish

suiteName.description: A suite of apex test classes to run

testRunId.description: ID of an in-progress or completed apex test run

verbose.description: Include more test information in context

usernameOrAlias.description: The username or alias for the Salesforce org

directory.description: The directory to run this tool from (absolute path)

name: run_agent_test
description: Run Agent tests in an org (aiEvaluationDefinition tests only, NOT Apex tests).

usernameOrAlias.description: The username or alias for the Salesforce org

directory.description: The directory to run this tool from (absolute path)

async.description: Whether to wait for tests to finish or return test id immediately

name: assign_permission_set
description: Assign a permission set to one or more org users.

permissionSetName.description: A single permission set to assign

usernameOrAlias.description: The username or alias for the Salesforce org

onBehalfOf.description: A username or alias to assign the permission set to on behalf of (only when explicitly requested)

directory.description: The directory to run this tool from (absolute path)

name: create_scratch_org
description: Creates a scratch org with the specified parameters.

directory.description: The directory to run this tool from (absolute path)

duration.description: Number of days before the org expires

definitionFile.description: Path to scratch definition JSON file

async.description: Return immediately with org ID (true) or wait for completion (false)

setDefault.description: Set newly created scratch org as default-target-org

snapshot.description: Snapshot name to use when creating a scratch org

sourceOrg.description: 15-character ID of the org shape to base the scratch org on

username.description: Username of the scratch org admin user

description.description: Description given to the scratch org

adminEmail.description: Email address for the org's admin user

name: delete_org
description: Deletes a specified Salesforce org. ALWAYS confirm with the user before deleting.

directory.description: The directory to run this tool from (absolute path)

usernameOrAlias.description: The username or alias of the org to delete

name: open_org
description: Open a Salesforce org in the browser. You can specify a metadata file you want to open.

filePath.description: File path of the metadata to open (must be an existing file path in the project)

usernameOrAlias.description: The username or alias for the Salesforce org

directory.description: The directory to run this tool from (absolute path)

name: resume_tool_operation
description: Resume a long running operation that was not completed by another tool.

jobId.description: The job id of the long running operation to resume

wait.description: Amount of time to wait for the operation to complete in minutes

usernameOrAlias.description: The username or alias for the Salesforce org

directory.description: The directory to run this tool from (absolute path)

name: create_org_snapshot
description: Creates a new snapshot of an org.

directory.description: The directory to run this tool from (absolute path)

sourceOrg.description: The org username or alias to create a snapshot of
